headline: EQT CEO Toby Rice on the energy that built America
summary: EQT CEO Toby Rice reflects on America’s history of energy innovation. From the country’s discovery of coal, oil and beyond, Rice explains why abundant, reliable energy has been critical to American economic growth and business success.
